description_long: This is an ornate, three-armed candelabrum-style lamp with a richly decorated metallic finish. The lamp features a central vertical stem with intricate engravings and a broad, round base for stability. Three bowl-shaped holders extend from the central column, two on curved arms and one at the top, each with a textured, gold-toned interior. The arms are symmetrically curved and attached to the main stem, giving the lamp a balanced and elegant appearance. The surface is adorned with elaborate patterns and a small red accent on the central stem, enhancing its decorative appeal. The overall design suggests a vintage or classical aesthetic, suitable for upscale urban environments or historical settings.
description: An ornate, three-armed metallic candelabrum-style lamp with engraved patterns and gold-toned bowl holders. Features a decorative base and a small red accent on the central stem.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central stem and two bowl holders aligned vertically, with the ornate base visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying all three bowl holders, with the two curved arms extending outward and the decorative patterns clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the vertical alignment of the bowls and the engraved base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing all three bowl holders and the symmetrical curved arms.
